description: Overall this is a product that is leading the frontier with ai ugc content. For faceless channels this can be a game changer.
author: Jade M.
pros: Realistic digital avatars can be used to produce videos at scale. Multilingual support and fast video creation makes it ideal for e-commerce.
cons: The avatars still need some work, the voice cloning is noticed, and limited advanced features are lacking.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Heygen is the market leader in Avatar creation
description: Heygen has been a great product to get content out without having to shoot myself. Video creation is easy and with the video agent, I can create something quick or animation on the fly.
author: cesar R.
pros: I like that they keep on innovating and adding features that make it easy to produce content. I actually just got an update earlier today.
cons: I don't like paying for additional custom avatars as it adds up quick. I'd rather be able to invest more into credits to produce better overall quality content.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Luca R.
pros: The user interface is constantly evolving. There are very frequent updates and new features (but it's not certain that this is a positive point if it's not well managed).
cons: I’m a paying Hygen subscriber and have faced nothing but problems since day one. The platform is unstable, full of bugs, and every update seems to break something new. Latest issue: I spent three days creating an internal training video. After a simple text correction, the new version suddenly included constant keyboard typing sounds throughout the video. The entire project became unusable. The support is completely ineffective. I was passed from one agent to another with no real answers. One agent even told me he couldn’t find anything in their documentation—so I had to send him the link myself to Hygen’s own page explaining that transitions can include special effects like the “typewriter.” That option no longer exists in the interface, meaning it can’t be disabled. The only solution they suggested: start over. Unacceptable for a paid service. Hygen focuses more on self-promotion than on making a stable product. Avoid at all costs
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Hey gen, a solid avatar tool with more room for improvement
description: It's a good avatar tool for product videos. One of the best you can get right now but still need more fine tuning on the lip sync as sometimes the lip sync gets off but i have used many lip sync tools and this one is better than many. Just know however it's not perfect but it's headed in the right direction.
author: Anthony R.
pros: Hey gen has some very realistic avatars. It has one of the best lip sync features i ever seen but despite it being good its not five stars yet but its at least four stars.
cons: I like how the avatars look realistic in terms of aesthetic and skin tones. So the realism is almost there.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Intuitive user experience, quality delivery and good support
description: The app is almost always intuitive. I have been using it to create talking avatars from pre-recorded audio and then synchronize the avatars, creating a fluid dialogue.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The app is frequently updated, with high production quality and good support for problems or questions.
cons: Sometimes there is a delay in video production, but I believe that the wait has led to good results. There are faster plans available, at a higher cost.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Changing pricing of a subscription without any communication
description: I had been very happy with HeyGen up until now and had signed up for an annual subscription for translation services. Then, out of the blue, without any communication or explanation, the number of translation minutes was reduced overnight. When I signed up for the annual subscription, I was promised “unlimited” minutes, which is why I chose this option. Suddenly, it's limited to 120 minutes per month. When you contact support, they just say they had to change it and are in no way willing to find a good solution. I'm really speechless—I've never experienced such poor treatment of customers anywhere else.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I had been very happy with HeyGen up until now and had signed up for an annual subscription for translation services
cons: Then, out of the blue, without any communication or explanation, the number of translation minutes was reduced overnight.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: a new ai studio makes it easy to make videos.
description: making films for my online store used to take hours and was a pain. that only takes about 30 minutes with heygen's ai studio. there's no need for a camera or other fancy gear for me to make product ads. it helped me post more on tiktok, and now i get more hits. it helps me get things done faster and better.
author: Kuppam P.
pros: heygen's new ai studio is great for quickly making movies. i type a story, choose an avatar, and in minutes i have a video that looks like it was made by a pro. it's cool that i can change how my avatar moves to fit the mood with motion control. lots of voices and more than 100 characters let me make things for my small business that look real. it also works great for social media clips.
cons: when they say strange words, the lip sync can look a little off. also, the free plan only lets you make three short movies a month, which isn't enough to really test it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Although this is not 100% perfect for create video or lip syncing but this is the best for it's price and this is the only software I use for my job.
author: Chumrit T.
pros: Easy to use even with their Avatars or my own Avatar. This is the only platform I use to lip sync my Avatar. You can use your own voice or Text to speech in HeyGen itself.
cons: Video Avatar(Motion) have only 10 seconds and it will loop til the end of your VO or 'Text to speech' voice so ma be your clip will jerk every 10 seconds. Sometimes the Avatar don't follow your prompt but their staff said it's the early stage.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: It is truly beginner friendly, It's perfect for content creation. Makes things go faster and smoother.
author: MAZA C.
pros: I love how you create a talking avatar and make videos using a realistic human. All you do is type a script and choose your avatar and they have tons to choose from. Perfect for any type of online business. This saves me tons of time
cons: If you're just a causal user, then it can be quite expensive. When you have to render a video, it can be slow. Some of the Avatar voices sound a little bit robotic.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Sergii K.
pros: What stands out most about HeyGen is its intuitive design across various features, making sophisticated tasks accessible to users of all skill levels. The AI-driven content generation and voice synthesis offer remarkable efficiency and creativity, enabling users to produce high-quality, engaging content with minimal effort. The video editing suite impresses with its array of advanced tools that are both powerful and user-friendly, catering to a wide range of creative needs.
cons: A notable limitation in HeyGen is the inability to control the gestures of avatars in videos, which can restrict creative freedom and the ability to convey nuanced expressions or actions precisely. This could be a drawback for creators looking to produce highly customized and interactive content. Additionally, the platform's voice generation quality sometimes varies depending on the length of the text; while shorter texts are generally well-rendered, longer ones might lead to inconsistencies in voice tone and fluidity. These points suggest areas for potential enhancement to further elevate the user experience within HeyGen.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Make your life easier with HeyGen!
description: Overall, the Hey Gen presents a dynamic landscape with both opportunities and challenges. As technology continues to evolve, it's crucial to strike a balance between leveraging AI for efficiency and creativity while preserving the unique contributions that human editors bring to the field.
author: bermet T.
pros: Exploring video editing Hey Gen has been an exciting journey, presenting a myriad of opportunities to enhance efficiency and creativity in content production. The seamless integration of artificial intelligence into video editing processes not only streamlines mundane tasks but also opens up innovative possibilities for storytelling and visual expression. The potential for automating repetitive tasks, improving precision, and introducing novel effects has the potential to redefine the landscape of video creation. As these technologies evolve, Hey Gen opportunities seem poised to empower creators, offering new ways to bring ideas to life with greater ease and sophistication.
cons: While Hey Gen can automate certain aspects of video editing, there may be limitations in its ability to truly understand and replicate the depth of human creativity.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: HeyGen: A Reliable and User-Friendly Information Hub
author: Gladstone M.
pros: "I appreciate HeyGen's ability to provide quick and accurate information on a wide range of topics. The platform's responsiveness and versatility make it a valuable tool for obtaining reliable and helpful insights. The user-friendly interface and prompt assistance contribute to a positive and efficient user experience. HeyGen has proven to be a valuable resource for accessing information and assistance with various queries.
cons: I must say, I don't have any particular dislikes about HeyGen. I find it consistently reliable and user-friendly. Keep up the great work!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Prof. Dr. Dr. Roman E.
pros: Awesome tool, I use for presentations atm as I have no voice to talk
cons: if you are preparing a whole presentation, it becomes expensive
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: HeyGen offered me an intuitive and easy-to-navigate interface, allowing me to interact with it effectively and get desired results without any hassle. HeyGen features enable a high degree of customization, allowing me to guide the content generation in a way that aligns with my specific needs and goals. HeyGen delivered my content quickly, saving my time and effort in creating or sourcing content elsewhere. I recommend it.
author: Olha H.
pros: With clear HeyGen instructions, I can direct the content generation more precisely, ensuring that the final product is tailored to my preferences. HeyGen features not only increases the relevance and quality of the content but also provides a more interactive and user-centric approach, allowing me to shape the content in real-time based on my objectives.
cons: HeyGen is still in the process of being developed and has not yet been seamlessly integrated with the necessary AI tools or platforms. It takes time.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great platform for quick video mockups
description: Has increased my productivity significantly, doing mock-ups for characters and also for delivering educational content. Using my own voice (ideal) or with the numerous, and increasingly varied, voice models, I surprise myself with the creative combinations, and this is only the beginning!
author: Edgar F.
pros: I user the personal avatar features, to create educational content. Once created, the system allows me to produce instructional videos that are consistent and compelling. The animation features (facial, so far) create natural-looking and pleasing video snippets based on the narrative text I input. Not only a time-saver, but a game-changer
cons: Looking forward to hand/ body animation tools. Had trouble doing different backgrounds (i.e. transparencies) but I am sure these drawing/ paint features are a work in progress. Nothing I don't like but would like it more if simple hand drawn characters could be animated, even though they are less realistic looking than normal spokespeople
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I was thoroughly impressed with my experience using this tool. I highly recommend it!
author: Bruno T.
pros: It's completely new and innovative, offering a level of convenience and efficiency that is unparalleled. Heygen is set to revolutionize the way speakers and educators around the globe deliver their content.
cons: Slight adjustments may be needed, particularly regarding the naturalness of speech, due to the platform being a new technology. However, considering the incredible potential of this tool, these adjustments are easily manageable and do not detract from the excellent experience provided by the platform
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: It has been great. I mean the video quality and realism is exceptional, and `the operation is quite intuitive and easy.
author: Angel V.
pros: I am a beginner and so far everything has been very intuitive and easy to manage. I have also like that you can start for free with the credits they give you. The templates are extensive and help to find an option that closely matches what I need. The voice adjustments for videos are also very useful. It has excellent tutorials to get started. The creation of avatars is great, both in image and voice. Lab area is of great help.
cons: They give very few credits for my liking; they could improve that a bit. I know people who were allowed to create a free Avatar when they started, but in my case, they did not allow me to, I guess it is because of my profile. They could make this more democratic.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Michael D.
pros: The ability to create video content seamlessly via text.
cons: The UI isn't intuitive without taking the provided tutorials.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Heygen AI in Action: A Real-World Review
description: There is only the first experience, and it's great!
author: Vitalii U.
pros: The opportunity to create your high-quality avatar (digital copy). The next great thing is a translation of video from one language to another. It is great as the voice in translated language is like in a peaker and voice is synchronized with mimics
cons: Limited to circle and square generation of own avatars from the photo
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Carlo Pietro B.
pros: The quality of the results obtained especially with regard to TTS functionality. When used well it is very difficult to distinguish the avatar from the original subject.
cons: The ease of use especially when compared with the absolute fidelity, even in 4k, of the video that is produced, in absolutely competitive lead times.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Mi best experience as a newbie
author: Mayerlin R.
pros: I love HeyGen. It's a great tool that allowed me to make a project so realistic and so well created that the result simply blew me and my friends away. I will definitely use the tool again, because in addition to the realistic result, it is very easy to use and get amazing videos. One of the things I liked the most is the fact of having several options to create a super realistic video, one in which it was just a matter of selecting the avatar and writing a text or uploading an audio. The interface is easy to use and this options are in plain sight and this makes it all very easy.
cons: I would have liked that, even in the free trial, the option to create my own avatar had been enabled. Additionally, I would have wanted that the ad on "fine tune avatar" to clone my voice was included in the plans and not with additional charges.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I had a small problem at the beginning to validate my instant avatar but after contacting customer service they very quickly studied my problem and above all solved it. it must be said that the instant avatar validation system is hard but essential, because people with bad intentions could deceive people with this high quality of rendering
author: Sophiane B.
pros: above all heygen offers a modern, professional and very accessible interface, you can easily find everything in the right place. having tested almost all the other solutions currently available, it is by far the most qualitative and the most affordable.
cons: without menagment I have difficulty finding them because there is no really comparable competitor when we test them, I would say I can't wait to see the future improvements
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Recommend this highly for your business if you haven't used this yet!
author: karen G.
pros: It was recommended to me to try. I got on today and created my own animated avatar video for posting in my business. I provided a simple text to use and HeyGen created the rest!
cons: Maybe an easier way to export and use right away. I'm still working on this, but I'm sure I'll get it done or use their friendly customer support :)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very satisfied with the product, will save lots of time
author: Karan G.
pros: The low cost option for a quick avatar works perfectly fine
cons: The pricing climbs quite steeply for a finetuned version
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Juan Carlos G.
pros: As I am only in day 2, the overall appeal was obvious, being able to generate videos fluently in several languages is just awesome.
cons: Haven't found one yet, but maybe a little bit more natural language is needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
